response.justification: Candidate has broad full-stack experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at Google, which aligns with the AI-native engineering environment. However, the resume shows weak evidence of deep Python expertise (a must-have), and distributed/high-throughput systems experience is limited largely to one role at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic using DLang rather than Python. Staff-level technical strategy and stakeholder leadership signals are also thin, making this a borderline screen worth a conversation to probe depth.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with MCP and agentic AI tooling at Google
Broad polyglot full-stack background across web, mobile, embedded
Demonstrated craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, OSS contributions
concerns: Python is not listed in skills and absent from role descriptions
Limited evidence of distributed high-throughput systems at scale (mostly one role)
Staff-level technical strategy and cross-functional leadership signals are weak
